description.value:
Disease: Rotting Plague — Severity: [Serious] — Stage 3

Effects: As Stage 2. Wounds do not close — the character cannot benefit from natural HP recovery during short or long rests (magical healing still works).

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen).

system.vector: Undead claws, corpse-handling without protection, necrotic wounds
system.specialRules: Wounds do not close — the character cannot benefit from natural HP recovery during short or long rests (magical healing still works).

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Rotting Plague (Stage 3).
